gen_a_default.content: {"question": "We refunded a customer their full payment. Do we still have to pay Razorpay their processing fee?", "persona": "backend_engineer", "user_context": null, "answer": "Yes. gen_b_default.content: {"question": "A customer claims their card was used without authorization. Can Razorpay hold our settlement money?", "persona": "cto", "user_context": null, "answer": null, "clarifying_question": "What is the intimation status — has a Facility Provider already intimated Razorpay that a customer has reported an unauthorised debit? gen_c_default.content: {"question": "Razorpay suspended our account under Clause 16. How long can they hold our funds before releasing them?", "persona": "cto", "user_context": null, "answer": "The Razorpay Terms of Use do not specify a maximum duration for fund holds following a Clause 16 suspension. What is known: Part A §16.1 grants Razorpay PA the right to immediately suspend Services and settlement across a range of triggers. What is not said: any cap on how long settlements can remain held, or a release timeline. We recommend you escalate to Razorpay support in writing and engage legal counsel for any material hold.", "clause_citations": [{"clause_id": "Part A §16.1", "verbatim_excerpt": "Razorpay PA shall have the right to immediately suspend Services and settlement", "relevance": "supporting"}], "ambiguity": {"type": "silent", "what_is_known": "Part A §16.1 grants immediate suspension rights across many triggers.", "what_is_missing": "No maximum duration or release timeline for fund holds is defined anywhere in the ToS."}, "confidence": "low", "should_escalate": true}
